translations.*但此時問題就出現了：Codable Decode 換成 Entity Obje: *But here comes the problem: after decoding Codable into an Entity Object, we cannot distinguish between **"the data field is intended to be set to nil" and "the response did not provide the field"***
translations.*範例先簡化成只有 `id` 、 `file` 兩個資料欄位。*\n\n: *The example is simplified to only include two data fields: `id` and `file`.*
translations.*這樣就能區分出是有給欄位還是沒給欄位，後續要寫入 Core Data 時就能判: *This way, you can distinguish whether a field is provided or not. When writing to Core Data later, you can decide whether to update the field to null or leave it unchanged.*
translations.- **decode(Type, forKey:)** Handling Non:
- **decode(Type, forKey:)** Handling Non-Optional Data Fields

- **decodeIfPresent(Type, forKey:)** Handling Optional Data Fields

translations.1. When Response has a field & value: Op:
1. When the Response has a field and a value: OptionalValue.value(VALUE)

2. When the Response has the field and the value is null: OptionalValue.null

3. When the Response field is missing: nil
translations.1. When the response provides a field &:
1. When the response provides a field & value: Optional(VALUE)

2. When the response provides the field & the value is null: Optional(nil)

3. When the Response field is missing: nil

translations.> So when choosing packages like [Better: > So when choosing packages like [BetterCodable](https://github.com/marksands/BetterCodable){:target="_blank"} or [CodableWrappers](https://github.com/GottaGetSwifty/CodableWrappers){:target="_blank"}, you need to consider the current issues with Property Wrappers.
translations.> Some developers in the Swift community: > Some developers in the Swift community have proposed [adding a null Strategy similar to date Strategy in JSONDecoder](https://forums.swift.org/t/pitch-jsondecoder-nulldecodingstrategy/13980){:target="_blank"}, allowing us to distinguish the above cases, but there are currently no plans to include it.
translations.Codable 在使用上的各種奇技淫巧都用的差不多了，有些其實很繞，因為 Cod: Most of the clever tricks for using Codable have been tried, some of which are quite convoluted because Codable's strict constraints sacrifice much of the flexibility needed in real-world development. In the end, I even started questioning why I chose Codable in the first place, as its advantages seem to diminish over time...
translations.Optional!Optional! 在 Swift 上就很適合處理這個場景。\: Optional! Optional! In Swift, it is very suitable for handling this scenario.
translations.Response 有給欄位&值是 null 時：Optional(nil)\n: When the response provides the field & the value is null: Optional(nil)
translations.Response 有給欄位&值是 null 時：OptionalValue.nu: When the Response has the field & the value is null: OptionalValue.null
translations.Response 有給欄位&值時：Optional(VALUE)\n: When the response provides a field & value: Optional(VALUE)
translations.Response 有給欄位&值時：OptionalValue.value(VAL: When Response has a field & value: OptionalValue.value(VALUE)
translations.Response 沒給欄位時：nil\n: When the Response field is missing: nil
translations.Song Entity 自行複寫實踐 Decode 方式，使用 `contain: The Song Entity overrides the Decode method by using the `contains(.KEY)` function to check if the Response includes the field (regardless of its value). If it does, it decodes it into an OptionalValue; within the OptionalValue enum, it further decodes the actual desired value. If decoding succeeds with a value, it is stored in `.value(T)`; if the value is null (or decoding fails), it is stored in `.null`.
translations.Swift 社群有開發者提出 [增加類似 date Strategy 的 nul: Some developers in the Swift community have proposed [adding a null Strategy similar to date Strategy in JSONDecoder](https://forums.swift.org/t/pitch-jsondecoder-nulldecodingstrategy/13980){:target="_blank"}, allowing us to distinguish the above cases, but there are currently no plans to include it.
translations.[或许你并不需要重写 init(from:)方法](https://kemche: [Maybe You Don’t Need to Override the init(from:) Method](https://kemchenj.github.io/2018-07-09/){:target="_blank"}
translations.```swift\nstruct Song: Decodable {\n:
```swift
struct Song: Decodable {
    var id: Int
    var name: String?
    var file: String?
    var converImage: String?
    var likeCount: Int?
    var like: Bool?
    var length: Int?
}
```

```swift
struct Song: Decodable {
    var id: Int
    var name: String??
    var file: String??
    var converImage: String??
    var likeCount: Int??
    var like: Bool??
    var length: Int??
}
```
translations.但是….Codable JSONDecoder Decode 對 Double: However... Codable JSONDecoder Decode treats both Double Optional and Optional with decodeIfPresent, both considered as Optional, and does not specially handle Double Optional; so the result remains the same as before.
translations.但還沒開始研究細節就發現有 Property Wrapper 標記的 Codab: But before diving into the details, I found that for Codable properties marked with Property Wrapper, the API response must include that field; otherwise, a keyNotFound error occurs, even if the field is Optional. ?????
translations.使用泛型，T 為真實資料欄位型別；.value(T) 能放 Decode 出來的: Using generics, T represents the actual data field type; .value(T) holds the decoded value, while .null indicates the value is null.
translations.假設我們的歌曲 Entity 結構如下：\n\n: Assuming our Song Entity structure is as follows:
translations.前篇主要解決了 JSON String -&gt; Entity Object: The previous article mainly solved the Decodable mapping from JSON String to Entity Object. Once we have the Entity Object, we can convert it into a Model Object for use within the program, a View Model Object to handle data display logic, and so on; **on the other hand, we need to convert the Entity into an NSManagedObject to store it locally in Core Data**.
translations.合理的處理 Response Null 欄位資料、不一定都要重寫 init de: Handling Response Null Fields Properly Doesn’t Always Require Overriding init Decoder
translations.因 API EndPoint 並不一定會回傳完整資料欄位(只有 id 是一定會給: Since the API endpoint does not always return complete data fields (only the id is guaranteed), all fields except for id are Optional; for example, when fetching song information, a complete structure is returned, but when liking or favoriting a song, only the three related fields `id`, `likeCount`, and `like` are returned.
translations.因主要問題是 Optional 資料欄位、Decodable 類型，所以我們複寫: Since the main issue involves optional data fields and Decodable types, we override the decodeIfPresent<T: Decodable> method.
translations.在不想要自幹 Decoder 的情況下，複寫原本的 JSON Decoder 擴: Extending the original JSON Decoder to add more features without implementing a custom Decoder yourself.
translations.如前所述，我們的架構是JSON String -> Entity Object: As mentioned before, our architecture is JSON String -> Entity Object -> NSManagedObject, so when we get the Entity Object, it is already the result after decoding, and there is no raw data to manipulate. Of course, we could compare and operate on the original JSON String here, but if we do that, it's better not to use Codable at all.
The official forum also has a [discussion thread](https://forums.swift.org/t/using-property-wrappers-with-codable/29804){:target="_blank"} about this issue… it is expected to be fixed in the future.
translations.對於 A Response、B Response 的 file 來說都是 nul: For the files in A Response and B Response, both are null, but their meanings are different; A intends to set the file field to null (clearing the original data), while B wants to update other data and simply does not provide the file field.
translations.延伸前篇，我們可以自己在 init Decode 中，Decode 成 int/: Extending the previous article, we can decode as int/Bool in the init Decode and assign the value ourselves. This way, the original field can accept 0/1/true/false.
translations.我們可以自行 extenstion [KeyedDecodingContaine: We can create our own extension for [KeyedDecodingContainer](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/swift/keyeddecodingcontainer){:target="_blank"} to define public methods. Swift will prioritize executing our redefined methods within the module, overriding the original Foundation implementation.
translations.我們希望 API Response 有什麼欄位資料都能一併存入 Core Dat: We want to store all available fields from the API response into Core Data, updating only the changed fields if the data already exists (incremental update).
translations.所以原理也很簡單，只要 Decodable Type 是 OptionValue: The principle is simple: as long as the Decodable type is OptionValue<T>, it will always attempt to decode, allowing us to get different state results. However, it's also fine not to check the Decodable type, meaning all Optional fields will try to decode.
translations.所以選用 [BetterCodable](https://github.com/: So when choosing packages like [BetterCodable](https://github.com/marksands/BetterCodable){:target="_blank"} or [CodableWrappers](https://github.com/GottaGetSwifty/CodableWrappers){:target="_blank"}, you need to consider the current issues with Property Wrappers.
Following the previous article "[Summary of Real-World Codable Decode Issues](../1aa2f8445642/)," development has progressed and new scenarios and problems have emerged. This sequel continues to document the encountered situations and research process for future reference.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.本來預想可以用 Property Wrapper 做優雅的封裝，例如：\n\n: Originally, I expected to use a Property Wrapper for elegant encapsulation, for example:
translations.這邊推測原本 decodeIfPresent 的實作是，如果資料是 null 或: Here, it is speculated that the original implementation of decodeIfPresent returns nil directly if the data is null or the response does not provide the field, without actually performing decode.
translations.首先參考 [上一篇](../1aa2f8445642/) 使用 Associat: First, refer to the [previous article](../1aa2f8445642/) on using Associated Value Enum as a container for values.
